title: senecio squalidus
intro: Senecio squalidus, also known as the old man's thistle or Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant native to China and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting the immune system. Senecio squalidus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal preparations.
